# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="comments-section">
                <h3>Comments</h3>
                @forelse($comments as $comment)
                    <div class="comment card mb-3">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <div class="comment-content">
                                {!! $comment->content !!}
                            </div>
                            <div class="comment-meta text-muted">
                                <small>
                                    By {{ $comment->user->name }} on {{ $comment->created_at->format('M d, Y g:i A') }}
                                </small>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                @empty
                    <p>No comments yet. Be the first to comment!</p>
                @endforelse
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
@endsection
